messages.content:
сейчас я тебе буду скидывать вопрос и возможные ответы на него
отвечай только одним ответом из предложенных на английском
Хорошо, готов ответить на твой вопрос.

A namespace is:
a space with a name


a name with a space


a space in which names exist
a space in which names exist

If you want to import pi from math, which line will you use?
import pi from math


from pi import math


from math import pi
from math import pi

Which one of the following is true?

modules can contain modules


packages can contain modules


modules can contain packages
packages can contain modules

Q:   What can you do to indicate that a module entity should be treated as private? (Select two answers)


you can mark the entity name with the # prefix


you can mark the entity name with the _ (single underscore) prefix


you can mark the entity name with the __ (double underscore) prefix


nothing - all module entities are private by default

you can mark the entity name with the _ (single underscore) prefix

you can mark the entity name with the __ (double underscore) prefix

A PWG-lead repository, collecting open-source Python code, is called:

PyRep


PWGR


PyCR


PyPI
PyPI

PyPI is often referred to as:


Py Software Store


Cheese Shop


Python Play


pyΠ
Cheese Shop

The name pip comes from:



 Prev Next 
 
Q:  The name pip comes from:


package inside package


pip installs packages


peripheral interchange program


python internal packager
pip installs packages

What is true about pip? (Select two answers)



there are two different pip implementations, one for Python 2 and the other for Python 3


it's a command-line tool


it's always available because it's installed along with Python


it's a GUI tool

there are two different pip implementations, one for Python 2 and the other for Python 3

it's a command-line tool

When you use pip to install a package that requires one or more dependencies, then:




you'll have to install all the dependencies by yourself before you install the desired package


the package will install all the dependencies during its first run


you'll have to install all the dependencies by yourself after you install the desired package


pip will take care of everything by itself
pip will take care of everything by itself

Which of the following commands will you use to determine your pip version? (Select three answers)



pip version


pip -version


pip --version


pip ---version
pip --version
несколько ответов нужно

Извините за недоразумение. Вот правильные ответы:

pip --version

pip -V

pip --V

A list of package's dependencies can be obtained from pip using its command named:

list


deps


dir


show
show
